AGENT-VERIFIED (headless Chrome, own profile, real ~260MB fp32 download): 'I would be grateful if you could review the attached report…' scored 99.7% formal; a Node transformers.js cross-check of the same override-loaded model gives formal 0.9965 for that text and informal 0.9948 for 'yo whats up wanna grab food later lol' — correct register on both poles. Binary softmax over 2 logits.
rubric.notes: Register axis behaves orthogonally to sentiment as intended.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel layout without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout with logical properties + intrinsic sizing; §6 overflow-tracking; break long unbreakable tokens (overflow-wrap: anywhere) so a content-sized table can shrink below its longest token on a narrow viewport.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied AND FIXED A REAL BUG: the at-a-glance model id 'Deepchecks/roberta_base_formality_ranker_onnx' (one 354px unbreakable token) forced the table to 461px, causing 142px of horizontal overflow at 360px. Added `.inside-table td/th { overflow-wrap: anywhere }` (scoped to this page's injected CSS) — re-measured page overflow 142px→9px (within the responsive-check tolerance; that residual is uniform across all pages incl. the minimal basics page, i.e. shell/rounding, not content). meter/sentence rows use flex-wrap+gap+min-inline-size:0; the API <pre> scrolls internally.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: AGENT-VERIFIED: before-fix overflowM=142; after-fix desktop 0 + mobile 9 across main/basics/practical/wild/multi-model; responsive-check reports desktop+mobile clean.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Break up long main-thread tasks / yield so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — classification, the N+1 occlusion attribution pass, and the multi-model detect→paraphrase→re-score chain all run in a Web Worker off the main thread; the 'as you type' input is debounced (400ms). Occlusion batches all word-out variants into ONE pipeline call.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread = pass; console clean during typing

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible live region status; formality meter
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce loading/ready/error via role=status aria-live; give the meter an aria-hidden decorative bar with a textual verdict alongside; label every button.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — loader + run/attr statuses are role=status aria-live=polite; the formality meter bar is aria-hidden with the verdict + percentage in adjacent live text; sample chips + buttons are labelled real buttons.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.

openQuestions: fp32 ~260 MB (no quantised export exists) is heavy on constrained mobile; the demo degrades honestly (labelled size + Download button, never silent), but a smaller build would broaden mobile reach — worth watching for a q8 export upstream.
The multi-model page loads ~495 MB combined (formality + T5 paraphraser); acceptable on desktop/capable phones but heavy — consider gating the paraphraser behind an explicit opt-in.

followUpGoals.goal: If a quantised (q8) ONNX export of the roberta-base formality ranker appears upstream, add it as a lighter variant to cut the ~260MB fp32 download for mobile.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for formality-detection (text-classification, wasm, Deepchecks/roberta_base_formality_ranker_onnx via subfolder+model_file_name override, fp32 ~260MB). Real headless run confirmed: 'I would be grateful…' scored 99.7% formal (correct), casual text scores informal (Node cross-check), cached reload auto-inits with no Load button, clean console. Fixed a real 142px mobile overflow from the long model-id token (overflow-wrap). Support flipped to ok on both classes.
